issues.description: TrashFromHand is incorrect. The card trashes from board (a Character in play), not from hand. Should be 'KO' or a board trash action.
Filter references 'subType' but should target board Characters with type 'Homies', not hand cards. Filter structure is wrong for board targeting.
Rest action targets Self, but the ability requires the condition 'trash 1 of your Homies' to be optional ('You may'). The Rest should only execute if trash occurs.

PlayFromHand is incorrect for 'Set up' which means make active. Should be 'Rest' to set as active (or equivalent state change). Also, this targets [Charlotte Linlin] Characters already on board, not from hand.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' is unexplained and not supported by card text. Should be removed.
Ability is optional ('You may') but DSL structure doesn't reflect optionality of the trash requirement.
